prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='FT_rf', seasonality_champion='THETA', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.11) and high seasonality variance (0.78), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_rf dominates trend tracking while THETA excels at seasonality, with ONLY_CWT_rf leading overall RMSE. The divergent early/late horizon specialists further support a robust combination approach that can handle this heterogeneity.

raw.pattern_analyst:

  "tier1_models": ["ONLY_CWT_rf", "FT_catboost", "DWT_rf", "DWT_catboost", "CWT_svr", "ONLY_CWT_svr", "rf", "NaiveMovingAverage"],
  "tier2_models": ["ARIMA", "FT_svr", "ONLY_FT_rf", "THETA", "DWT_svr", "ONLY_DWT_rf", "ETS", "FT_rf"],
  "recommended_method_hint": "dba_combination",
  "recommended_weighting_basis": "mixed",

    "rmse_spread_ratio": 1.1098,
    "high_disagreement": true,
    "high_seasonality_variance": true,
    "ytrue_trend_directions": ["down", "down", "up"]
  },
  "cot_narrative": "Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.11) and high seasonality variance (0.78), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_rf dominates trend tracking while THETA excels at seasonality, with ONLY_CWT_rf leading overall RMSE. The divergent early/late horizon specialists further support a robust combination approach that can handle this heterogeneity."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=1.11) and high seasonality variance (0.78), indicating models capture patterns very differently. FT_rf dominates trend tracking while THETA excels at seasonality, with ONLY_CWT_rf leading overall RMSE. The divergent early/late horizon specialists further support a robust combination approach that can handle this heterogeneity.

proposer.rationale: n_unique_winners=8 indicates high horizon heterogeneity favoring per-horizon selection methods. relative_spread_mean=0.46 (≥0.25 threshold) justifies robust combination approaches like dba_combination and inverse_rmse_weights with shrinkage. RMSE spread ratio=1.11 shows extreme model disagreement, supporting diverse method types. n_windows=3 ≤ 4 requires small top_k (3) and shrinkage≥0.3 for stability. Pattern analyst recommends dba_combination for high seasonality variance (0.78). FT_rf trend champion + THETA seasonality champion supports mixed selection/weighted strategy.
